---
title: "group_2_novo"
output: html_document
date: "2025-06-27"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# ─── LIBRARIES ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
library(tidyverse)
library(cowplot)
library(ggrepel)
library(plotly)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(htmltools)
library(glue)
library(seqinr)
library(ggiraph)
library(fs) 
```


```{r}

# ─── PARAMETERS & PATHS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
feature         <- 8284
fasta_path      <- "../../data/novo_examples.fasta"
activations_csv <- glue("../../data/concept_groups/stats/group_2/feature_{feature}_activations_ALL_novo.csv")
output_dir      <- glue("../../figures/group_2/")
html_out        <- file.path(output_dir, glue("feature_{feature}_interactive_novo.html"))
dir_create(output_dir, recurse = TRUE)
```

```{r}

# ─── READ FULL SEQUENCES ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
seqs_list <- read.fasta(fasta_path, seqtype="AA", as.string=TRUE, strip.desc=TRUE)
seq_df    <- tibble(Entry = names(seqs_list),
                    Sequence = toupper(unlist(seqs_list)))
```

```{r}

# ─── READ ACTIVATIONS & EXTRACT RESIDUE ─────────────────────────────────────────
activations_df <- read_csv(activations_csv, col_types = cols(
  Entry      = col_character(),
  position   = col_integer(),
  activation = col_double()
)) %>%
  # strip trailing “.pt” from Entry
  mutate(Entry = str_remove(Entry, "\\.pt$")) %>%
  left_join(seq_df, by="Entry") %>%
  mutate(residue = str_sub(Sequence, position, position))
```

```{r make-function}
# ─── ENTRY → NAME MAP ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
title_map <- tibble(
  Entry = c("A0A1B0GVD1", "A0A1B0GTK4", "P01275", "P01189"),
  Name  = c("FAM237B",   "FAM237A",   "GLUCAGON", "POMC")
)

make_profile_girafe <- function(entry_id) {
  df_e    <- filter(activations_df, Entry == entry_id)
  seq_len <- max(df_e$position)
  y_max   <- max(df_e$activation, na.rm = TRUE)
  y_lim   <- if (y_max == 0) 1 else y_max * 1.2
  tick_h  <- y_lim * 0.09

  # lookup friendly name *before* ggplot
  friendly   <- title_map$Name[title_map$Entry == entry_id]
  plot_title <- paste0(entry_id, " — ", friendly)

  # build hover‐strip beneath each bar
  hover_strips <- df_e %>%
    transmute(
      xmin    = position - 0.5,
      xmax    = position + 0.5,
      ymin    = -tick_h,
      ymax    = 0,
      tooltip = glue::glue(
        "Position: {position}\n",
        "Residue:  {residue}"
      ),
      data_id = paste0(Entry, "_", position)
    )

  p <- ggplot() +
    # invisible hover‐strips
    geom_rect_interactive(
      data        = hover_strips,
      aes(
        xmin    = xmin,
        xmax    = xmax,
        ymin    = ymin,
        ymax    = ymax,
        tooltip = tooltip,
        data_id = data_id
      ),
      fill        = "transparent",
      color       = NA,
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    # bars with tooltip
    geom_col_interactive(
      data        = df_e,
      aes(
        x       = position,
        y       = activation,
        tooltip = glue(
          "Position: {position}\n",
          "Residue:  {residue}\n",
          "Activation: {round(activation,3)}"
        ),
        data_id = paste0(Entry, "_", position)
      ),
      fill   = "steelblue",
      color  = "gray40",
      size   = 0.1,
      width  = 1,
      alpha  = 0.7
    ) +
    # minor tick‐marks
    geom_segment(
      data = tibble(
        x    = seq(0.5, seq_len + 0.5, by = 1),
        xend = x,
        y    = 0,
        yend = -tick_h * 0.9
      ),
      aes(x = x, xend = xend, y = y, yend = yend),
      color       = "gray40",
      size        = 0.2,
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    # baseline
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", size = 0.3) +
    # x axis labeled by residue
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = df_e$position,
      labels = df_e$residue,
      limits = c(0.5, seq_len + 0.5),
      expand = expansion(0, 0)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(6),
      expand = expansion(0, 0)
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    labs(
      title = plot_title,
      x     = "Residue Position",
      y     = "Activation"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      plot.margin       = margin(t = 40, r = 10, b = 10, l = 10),
      panel.grid.major  = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor  = element_blank(),
      axis.line.y       = element_line(color = "black", size = 0.2),
      axis.ticks.x      = element_line(color = "black", size = 0.2),
      axis.ticks.y      = element_line(color = "black", size = 0.2),
      axis.text.x       = element_text(color = "black", margin = margin(t = 4), size = 5),
      axis.text.y       = element_text(color = "black"),
      axis.title.x      = element_text(margin = margin(t = 6)),
      axis.title.y      = element_text(margin = margin(r = 6)),
      panel.background  = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      plot.background   = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)
    )

  girafe(
    ggobj      = p,
    width_svg  = 11,
    height_svg = 5,
    options    = list(
      opts_hover(css = "fill-opacity:1;cursor:pointer;")
    )
  )
}

```



```{r}
# ─── BUILD & STACK WIDGETS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
entries_for_plot <- unique(activations_df$Entry)

widgets <- map(entries_for_plot, make_profile_girafe)

# add spacing between each
spaced_widgets <- lapply(widgets, function(w) {
  tags$div(style = "margin: 50px 20px;", w)
})

all_page <- tagList(
  lapply(spaced_widgets, function(w) {
    list(w, htmltools::br())
  })
)

# ─── SAVE TO HTML ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
htmltools::save_html(all_page, html_out)
message("Wrote interactive plots to ", html_out)

```
